message:
feat: /clear resets session identity and emits session_clear event

Add session_clear to EventKind union type. Change SessionController's
sessionId/logPath from readonly fields to getter-backed private fields
so /clear can generate a new session identity, fresh metadata, and
emit a session_clear event with the new session ID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
